At six seconds, a knife slices the finished brown loaf on a wooden board. Finally, the man displays fresh yellow bananas, pointing at them as a subscribe overlay appears. These scenes depict the full process from preparation to serving.

At 14 seconds, the camera shifts from a torso close-up to reveal the man's face while he holds bananas. Between 14 and 16 seconds, he continues holding the fruit as the shot stabilizes. By 24 seconds, he raises the bunch of yellow bananas near his shoulder, gesturing with his right hand near his waist against a backdrop of white cabinetry and hanging copper pans.

Between 26 and 28 seconds, the man lowers fresh bananas then presents a baking sheet with three blackened, roasted ones. From 30 to 32 seconds, a close-up shows a finger pressing into a dark banana's skin to demonstrate its soft texture. Finally, at 34 seconds, the man holds the tray of roasted fruit while gesturing with a loose fist in front of the green stove.

From 36 to 44 seconds, the man pours white flour from a copper measuring cup into a glass bowl resting on a digital scale. Between 48 and 54 seconds, a hand scoops more flour from a large jar using the same copper cup. Finally, from 58 to 64 seconds, the man holds a small spoon containing white powder, pointing at it and gesturing while speaking to the camera, with copper pans visible in the background.

answers.text: C

queries.question: What specific actions involving the food and tools are visible at different timestamps in the video?

answers.text: At the start, a man holds bread while a copper cup scoops flour. By two seconds, hands peel a dark banana before a mixer blends ingredients in a glass bowl. At six seconds, a knife slices the finished brown loaf on a wooden board. Finally, the man displays fresh yellow bananas, pointing at them as a subscribe overlay appears. These scenes depict the full process from preparation to serving.

At 14 seconds, the camera shifts from a torso close-up to reveal the man's face while he holds bananas. Between 14 and 16 seconds, he continues holding the fruit as the shot stabilizes. By 24 seconds, he raises the bunch of yellow bananas near his shoulder, gesturing with his right hand near his waist against a backdrop of white cabinetry and hanging copper pans.

Between 26 and 28 seconds, the man lowers fresh bananas then presents a baking sheet with three blackened, roasted ones. From 30 to 32 seconds, a close-up shows a finger pressing into a dark banana's skin to demonstrate its soft texture. Finally, at 34 seconds, the man holds the tray of roasted fruit while gesturing with a loose fist in front of the green stove.

From 36 to 44 seconds, the man pours white flour from a copper measuring cup into a glass bowl resting on a digital scale. Between 48 and 54 seconds, a hand scoops more flour from a large jar using the same copper cup. Finally, from 58 to 64 seconds, the man holds a small spoon containing white powder, pointing at it and gesturing while speaking to the camera, with copper pans visible in the background.

At 14 seconds, the camera shifts from a torso close-up to reveal the man's face while he holds bananas. Between 14 and 16 seconds, he continues holding the fruit as the shot stabilizes. By 24 seconds, he raises the bunch of yellow bananas near his shoulder, gesturing with his right hand near his waist against a backdrop of white cabinetry and hanging copper pans.

Between 26 and 28 seconds, the man lowers fresh bananas then presents a baking sheet with three blackened, roasted ones. From 30 to 32 seconds, a close-up shows a finger pressing into a dark banana's skin to demonstrate its soft texture. Finally, at 34 seconds, the man holds the tray of roasted fruit while gesturing with a loose fist in front of the green stove.

From 36 to 44 seconds, the man pours white flour from a copper measuring cup into a glass bowl resting on a digital scale. Between 48 and 54 seconds, a hand scoops more flour from a large jar using the same copper cup. Finally, from 58 to 64 seconds, the man holds a small spoon containing white powder, pointing at it and gesturing while speaking to the camera, with copper pans visible in the background.
